payload_visibility_policy.tree_only_guarded: taxonomy/concept labels only; raw paperId membership leaves forbidden
payload_visibility_policy.flat_concepts: flat concept labels only; raw paperId membership leaves forbidden
payload_visibility_policy.random_hierarchy: randomized concept labels only; raw paperId membership leaves forbidden
payload_visibility_policy.tree_with_papers: taxonomy/concept labels plus reference paper titles only; raw paperId/year/external_ids/abstracts forbidden
